theme.vibe: Old Money Click, Chunky Borders, High Contrast

grid_layout.title: Hi, I'm Sujal.
grid_layout.subtitle: Driven technologist turning complex problems into elegant, scalable solutions.
grid_layout.content: CS Student at Amity University (9.26 CGPA). AI/ML Lead at GDG. Data Analyst at Arista Systems.

experiences.organization: Google Developer Groups (GDG) — Amity University Mumbai
experiences.short_desc: Leading AI/ML vertical for GDG chapter, managing 250+ students across 3 offline events.
detailed_content: Designed and delivered curriculum covering ML, GenAI, Data Science, and industrial techniques
Managed 250+ students across 3 offline on-campus events — workshops on ML algorithms, data manipulation, and GenAI tool usage
Mentored project teams building ML-powered applications; reviewed models for accuracy, fairness, and deployment readiness

experiences.short_desc: Built filter-based analytics platform and time-series forecasting model achieving 82.6% accuracy.
detailed_content: Built a filter-based analytics platform for real-time insight generation across multi-source data pipelines using Python & SQL
Engineered a time-series forecasting model with Facebook Prophet for e-commerce sales prediction, achieving 82.6% accuracy
Automated routine data pulls & reporting workflows, reducing manual report preparation time by ~30%

projects.title: Scalable Dense Passage Retrieval System
projects.short_desc: 50x memory compression with 15ms query latency, 61.5% Recall@10.
detailed_content: Achieved 50x memory compression (4.6MB vs 230.7MB) in a dense passage retrieval system while maintaining 15ms query latency, enabling high-performance RAG deployment on resource-constrained edge devices
Delivered high-precision retrieval pipeline achieving 61.5% Recall@10 with trade-off justified by a 50x reduction in infrastructure costs, enabling million-scale vector search on commodity hardware

projects.title: AI-Powered Data Quality & Automation Platform
projects.short_desc: AI diagnostic engine with non-blocking data processing for instantaneous analytics.
detailed_content: Developed an AI-powered diagnostic engine that automated data preparation by integrating LLM to generate multiple context-aware treatment plans & intelligent data cleaning measures
Designed a scalable non-blocking data processing engine with Celery and Redis, delivering instantaneous cached statistical analyses even for large datasets

projects.title: BioVisuals — Molecular Structure using LLM
projects.short_desc: Interactive 3D molecular visualization with LLM-generated biological annotations.
detailed_content: Built an interactive 3D molecular visualization tool integrating LLM-generated biological annotations for protein/ligand structures, bridging computational biology and generative AI
Enabling researchers to query and visualize protein-ligand interactions in real time
